flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Macomb Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Macomb Community College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 (11.5% → 13.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Macomb Community College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.8k → $6.0k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Macomb Community College are 11% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($41.6k vs $37.3k).
